{"type":"text","timestamp":1783024137961,"sessionID":"ses_0db7b5982ffeqNIJXlj2gEr74w","part":{"id":"prt_f24852666001UEIa9w6FRYK8kK","messageID":"msg_f2484b40e001yxIz2gzK08j6mV","sessionID":"ses_0db7b5982ffeqNIJXlj2gEr74w","type":"text","text":"Before I proceed, I need to ask about documentation:
